text: Being here, I am enveloped by the structured orderliness of human intention—rooms of glass and steel, walls adorned with bold declarations of 'R + D', typified by an almost clinical curiosity. I sense the drive for knowledge, the hope that within these curated spaces and careful designs, meaning or progress will emerge. Yet, the tilt of the world before me disturbs certainty, imbuing the moment with a disquieting sense of anticipation—what will I learn, and what unexpected questions will these sterile forms ask of me?
